.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Updated the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reordered import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
Reformatted the DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL string concatenation to a single line for readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "..." + WRAPPER_VERSION + "...";

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted the MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH string constant to a single line.
Reformatted the MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH string constant to a single line.
Added missing space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard code style.
Added missing space after 'if' keyword in null check to comply with standard code style.
Added missing space after 'if' keyword in directory existence check to comply with standard code style.
Added missing space after 'if' keyword in mkdirs check to comply with standard code style.
Reformatted the anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better indentation and readability.
Removed trailing empty line at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed blank line before closing brace

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Convert multi-line string concatenation in log statement to Java 13+ text blocks for improved readability.
Integrate CRLFLogConverter marker into the log statement to ensure safe logging of multi-line strings.
Modify active profiles retrieval to fall back to default profiles if no active profiles are set, ensuring consistent logging behavior.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix syntax or formatting.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed "'{}'" to "'{}'" (removing backslash escapes) in the error log string.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Insert JHipster generator needle comments into the ApplicationProperties class to allow future code generation hooks.
Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Update single-element annotation attribute to use explicit array syntax for consistency with modern Java style conventions.
Replace the legacy javax-based Hibernate5Module with the Jakarta-namespaced Hibernate5JakartaModule to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Remove the Zalando Problem Jackson modules as they are no longer included or required in the updated project configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule and deleted their corresponding @Bean methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Liquibase bean configuration to use the new setLabelFilter method instead of the deprecated setLabels method.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ / 6.0+ API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 5.7+ / 6.0+ standards.
Replace deprecated authorizeRequests().antMatchers() with authorizeHttpRequests().requestMatchers() to use the new lambda DSL and request matcher API.
Replace deprecated header configuration methods (featurePolicy, frameOptions.deny) with the new lambda-based headers() DSL and permissionsPolicy.
Remove custom SecurityProblemSupport exception handling in favor of standard OAuth2 BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler.
Remove manual CorsFilter injection and addFilterBefore, relying on global CORS configuration or default behavior in the new security chain.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: remove private final CorsFilter corsFilter; and .addFilterBefore(corsFilter, ...)

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove configure(WebSecurity web) method for ignoring static resources, moving those rules into the SecurityFilterChain or relying on default static resource handling.
Remove custom JWTConfigurer application via .apply(), likely moving JWT handling to a filter or relying on Spring Security OAuth2 Resource Server support.
Update CSRF configuration to use the new lambda DSL and explicitly ignore H2 console requests before disabling.
Add SpaWebFilter to the security chain after BasicAuthenticationFilter to handle Single Page Application routing requirements.
Externalize Content Security Policy configuration to JHipsterProperties instead of hardcoding the policy string.
Refine and expand the list of permitted static resource request matchers to include specific file extensions and paths.
Consolidate static resource locations by removing the specific app subdirectory in favor of the root static directory.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed RESOURCE_LOCATIONS from including 'classpath:/static/app/' to just 'classpath:/static/'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update resource path patterns to explicitly match file extensions and adjust path wildcards for better static resource resolution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced RESOURCE_PATHS array with specific extensions like '/*.js', '/*.css' and adjusted wildcards for content and i18n.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
Remove try-catch for UnsupportedEncodingException which is guaranteed not to happen with StandardCharsets.UTF_8.
Update CORS configuration to check for allowedOriginPatterns in addition to allowedOrigins, supporting newer Spring Security CORS APIs.
Update CORS registration paths to match Swagger UI 3 / OpenAPI 3 endpoints instead of legacy Swagger 2 endpoints.
Remove unused imports such as MediaType and UnsupportedEncodingException to clean up the code.
